CustomField.description: Please note: The data stored in this field is linked to the HomeKeeper National Data Hub. This formula checkbox will be checked if the Resale Type for this file is "Sold to Ineligible Buyer," "Deed In Lieu," "Short Sale to Ineligible Buyer," or "Foreclosure."
CustomField.formula: ISPICKVAL(HOMEtracker__Resale_Type__c, "Sold to Ineligible Buyer") || ISPICKVAL(HOMEtracker__Resale_Type__c, "Deed In Lieu") || ISPICKVAL(HOMEtracker__Resale_Type__c, "Short Sale to Ineligible Buyer") || ISPICKVAL(HOMEtracker__Resale_Type__c, "Foreclosure")
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This formula checkbox will be checked if the Resale Type for this file is "Sold to Ineligible Buyer," "Deed In Lieu," "Short Sale to Ineligible Buyer," or "Foreclosure."
CustomField.label: Lost Unit
